name: mail-workspace
title: Agent-Native Mail Workspace
description: Agent-Native Mail Agent-Native template ported into Studio UI as a Harness-safe workspace surface with route inventory, provenance, resident-renderer blocks, and display-only agent/action affordances.

files.content:
{
  "$schema": "https://jami.studio/schemas/registry/workspace-manifest.generated.json",
  "name": "@jami-studio/mail-workspace",
  "workspace": "mail",
  "schemaVersion": "2026-06-29.agent-native-template-workspace",
  "items": [
    "jami-theme",
    "panel",
    "button",
    "data-list",
    "text-field",
    "mail-app",
    "mail-catchall-page",
    "mail-detail-detail-page",
    "mail-detail-page",
    "mail-home-page",
    "mail-draft-queue-detail-page",
    "mail-draft-queue-page",
    "mail-email-page",
    "mail-extensions-detail-detail-page",
    "mail-extensions-detail-page",
    "mail-extensions-index-page",
    "mail-extensions-page",
    "mail-settings-page",
    "mail-team-page",
    "mail-catchall-block",
    "mail-detail-detail-block",
    "mail-detail-block",
    "mail-home-block",
    "mail-draft-queue-detail-block",
    "mail-draft-queue-block",
    "mail-email-block",
    "mail-extensions-detail-detail-block",
    "mail-extensions-detail-block",
    "mail-extensions-index-block",
    "mail-extensions-block",
    "mail-settings-block",
    "mail-team-block"
  ],
  "installGraph": {
    "root": "mail-workspace",
    "dependencies": [
      "jami-theme",
      "panel",
      "button",
      "data-list",
      "text-field",
      "mail-app",
      "mail-catchall-page",
      "mail-detail-detail-page",
      "mail-detail-page",
      "mail-home-page",
      "mail-draft-queue-detail-page",
      "mail-draft-queue-page",
      "mail-email-page",
      "mail-extensions-detail-detail-page",
      "mail-extensions-detail-page",
      "mail-extensions-index-page",
      "mail-extensions-page",
      "mail-settings-page",
      "mail-team-page",
      "mail-catchall-block",
      "mail-detail-detail-block",
      "mail-detail-block",
      "mail-home-block",
      "mail-draft-queue-detail-block",
      "mail-draft-queue-block",
      "mail-email-block",
      "mail-extensions-detail-detail-block",
      "mail-extensions-detail-block",
      "mail-extensions-index-block",
      "mail-extensions-block",
      "mail-settings-block",
      "mail-team-block"
    ]
  },
  "plannedSurfaces": [
    ":",
    ":view",
    ":view",
    "mail",
    "draft-queue",
    "draft-queue",
    "email",
    "extensions",
    "extensions",
    "extensions",
    "extensions",
    "settings",
    "team"
  ],
  "shell": {
    "sourceSchemaVersion": "2026-06-29.agent-native-template-workspace",
    "title": "Agent-Native Mail",
    "summary": "Agent-Native Mail Agent-Native template ported into Studio UI as a Harness-safe workspace surface with route inventory, provenance, resident-renderer blocks, and display-only agent/action affordances.",
    "appShell": {
      "id": "app.mail.shell",
      "layout": "agent-native-template-workspace",
      "navigation": [
        {
          "label": "Catchall",
          "route": "/mail/:"
        },
        {
          "label": "Detail Detail",
          "route": "/mail/:view/:threadId"
        },
        {
          "label": "Detail",
          "route": "/mail/:view"
        },
        {
          "label": "Home",
          "route": "/mail"
        },
        {
          "label": "Draft Queue Detail",
          "route": "/mail/draft-queue/:id"
        },
        {
          "label": "Draft Queue",
          "route": "/mail/draft-queue"
        },
        {
          "label": "Email",
          "route": "/mail/email"
        },
        {
          "label": "Extensions Detail Detail",
          "route": "/mail/extensions/:id/:slug"
        }
      ]
    },
    "routes": [
      {
        "path": "/mail/:",
        "page": "page.mail.catchall",
        "title": "Catchall",
        "blocks": [
          "block.mail.catchall"
        ],
        "sourceRouteFile": "agent-native/templates/mail/app/routes/$.tsx"
      },
      {
        "path": "/mail/:view/:threadId",
        "page": "page.mail.detail-detail",
        "title": "Detail Detail",
        "blocks": [
          "block.mail.detail-detail"
        ],
        "sourceRouteFile": "agent-native/templates/mail/app/routes/$view.$threadId.tsx"
      },
      {
        "path": "/mail/:view",
        "page": "page.mail.detail",
        "title": "Detail",
        "blocks": [
          "block.mail.detail"
        ],
        "sourceRouteFile": "agent-native/templates/mail/app/routes/$view.tsx"
      },
      {
        "path": "/mail",
        "page": "page.mail.home",
        "title": "Mail Home",
        "blocks": [
          "block.mail.home"
        ],
        "sourceRouteFile": "agent-native/templates/mail/app/routes/_index.tsx"
      },
      {
        "path": "/mail/draft-queue/:id",
        "page": "page.mail.draft-queue-detail",
        "title": "Draft Queue Detail",
        "blocks": [
          "block.mail.draft-queue-detail"
        ],
        "sourceRouteFile": "agent-native/templates/mail/app/routes/draft-queue.$id.tsx"
      },
      {
        "path": "/mail/draft-queue",
        "page": "page.mail.draft-queue",
        "title": "Draft Queue",
        "blocks": [
          "block.mail.draft-queue"
        ],
        "sourceRouteFile": "agent-native/templates/mail/app/routes/draft-queue.tsx"
      },
      {
        "path": "/mail/email",
        "page": "page.mail.email",
        "title": "Email",
        "blocks": [
          "block.mail.email"
        ],
        "sourceRouteFile": "agent-native/templates/mail/app/routes/email.tsx"
      },
      {
        "path": "/mail/extensions/:id/:slug",
        "page": "page.mail.extensions-detail-detail",
        "title": "Extensions Detail Detail",
        "blocks": [
          "block.mail.extensions-detail-detail"
        ],
        "sourceRouteFile": "agent-native/templates/mail/app/routes/extensions.$id.$slug.tsx"
      },
      {
        "path": "/mail/extensions/:id",
        "page": "page.mail.extensions-detail",
        "title": "Extensions Detail",
        "blocks": [
          "block.mail.extensions-detail"
        ],
        "sourceRouteFile": "agent-native/templates/mail/app/routes/extensions.$id.tsx"
      },
      {
        "path": "/mail/extensions",
        "page": "page.mail.extensions-index",
        "title": "Extensions Index",
        "blocks": [
          "block.mail.extensions-index"
        ],
        "sourceRouteFile": "agent-native/templates/mail/app/routes/extensions._index.tsx"
      },
      {
        "path": "/mail/extensions",
        "page": "page.mail.extensions",
        "title": "Extensions",
        "blocks": [
          "block.mail.extensions"
        ],
        "sourceRouteFile": "agent-native/templates/mail/app/routes/extensions.tsx"
      },
      {
        "path": "/mail/settings",
        "page": "page.mail.settings",
        "title": "Settings",
        "blocks": [
          "block.mail.settings"
        ],
        "sourceRouteFile": "agent-native/templates/mail/app/routes/settings.tsx"
      },
      {
        "path": "/mail/team",
        "page": "page.mail.team",
        "title": "Team",
        "blocks": [
          "block.mail.team"
        ],
        "sourceRouteFile": "agent-native/templates/mail/app/routes/team.tsx"
      }
    ],
    "pages": [
      {
        "id": "page.mail.catchall",
        "title": "Catchall",
        "description": "Agent-Native mail route /: derived from $.tsx.",
        "components": [
          "data-list",
          "panel",
          "button"
        ],
        "sourceRouteFile": "agent-native/templates/mail/app/routes/$.tsx"
      },
      {
        "id": "page.mail.detail-detail",
        "title": "Detail Detail",
        "description": "Agent-Native mail route /:view/:threadId derived from $view.$threadId.tsx.",
        "components": [
          "data-list",
          "panel",
          "button"
        ],
        "sourceRouteFile": "agent-native/templates/mail/app/routes/$view.$threadId.tsx"
      },
      {
        "id": "page.mail.detail",
        "title": "Detail",
        "description": "Agent-Native mail route /:view derived from $view.tsx.",
        "components": [
          "data-list",
          "panel",
          "button"
        ],
        "sourceRouteFile": "agent-native/templates/mail/app/routes/$view.tsx"
      },
      {
        "id": "page.mail.home",
        "title": "Mail Home",
        "description": "Agent-Native mail route / derived from _index.tsx.",
        "components": [
          "data-list",
          "panel",
          "button"
        ],
        "sourceRouteFile": "agent-native/templates/mail/app/routes/_index.tsx"
      },
      {
        "id": "page.mail.draft-queue-detail",
        "title": "Draft Queue Detail",
        "description": "Agent-Native mail route /draft-queue/:id derived from draft-queue.$id.tsx.",
        "components": [
          "text-field",
          "panel",
          "button"
        ],
        "sourceRouteFile": "agent-native/templates/mail/app/routes/draft-queue.$id.tsx"
      },
      {
        "id": "page.mail.draft-queue",
        "title": "Draft Queue",
        "description": "Agent-Native mail route /draft-queue derived from draft-queue.tsx.",
        "components": [
          "text-field",
          "panel",
          "button"
        ],
        "sourceRouteFile": "agent-native/templates/mail/app/routes/draft-queue.tsx"
      },
      {
        "id": "page.mail.email",
        "title": "Email",
        "description": "Agent-Native mail route /email derived from email.tsx.",
        "components": [
          "text-field",
          "panel",
          "button"
        ],
        "sourceRouteFile": "agent-native/templates/mail/app/routes/email.tsx"
      },
      {
        "id": "page.mail.extensions-detail-detail",
        "title": "Extensions Detail Detail",
        "description": "Agent-Native mail route /extensions/:id/:slug derived from extensions.$id.$slug.tsx.",
        "components": [
          "data-list",
          "panel",
          "button"
        ],
        "sourceRouteFile": "agent-native/templates/mail/app/routes/extensions.$id.$slug.tsx"
      },
      {
        "id": "page.mail.extensions-detail",
        "title": "Extensions Detail",
        "description": "Agent-Native mail route /extensions/:id derived from extensions.$id.tsx.",
        "components": [
          "data-list",
          "panel",
          "button"
        ],
        "sourceRouteFile": "agent-native/templates/mail/app/routes/extensions.$id.tsx"
      },
      {
        "id": "page.mail.extensions-index",
        "title": "Extensions Index",
        "description": "Agent-Native mail route /extensions derived from extensions._index.tsx.",
        "components": [
          "data-list",
          "panel",
          "button"
        ],
        "sourceRouteFile": "agent-native/templates/mail/app/routes/extensions._index.tsx"
      },
      {
        "id": "page.mail.extensions",
        "title": "Extensions",
        "description": "Agent-Native mail route /extensions derived from extensions.tsx.",
        "components": [
          "data-list",
          "panel",
          "button"
        ],
        "sourceRouteFile": "agent-native/templates/mail/app/routes/extensions.tsx"
      },
      {
        "id": "page.mail.settings",
        "title": "Settings",
        "description": "Agent-Native mail route /settings derived from settings.tsx.",
        "components": [
          "text-field",
          "panel",
          "button"
        ],
        "sourceRouteFile": "agent-native/templates/mail/app/routes/settings.tsx"
      },
      {
        "id": "page.mail.team",
        "title": "Team",
        "description": "Agent-Native mail route /team derived from team.tsx.",
        "components": [
          "data-list",
          "panel",
          "button"
        ],
        "sourceRouteFile": "agent-native/templates/mail/app/routes/team.tsx"
      }
    ],
    "blocks": [
      {
        "id": "block.mail.catchall",
        "title": "Catchall",
        "component": "data-list",
        "stateExamples": [
          "loading",
          "empty",
          "error",
          "long-content"
        ],
        "sourceRouteFile": "agent-native/templates/mail/app/routes/$.tsx"
      },
      {
        "id": "block.mail.detail-detail",
        "title": "Detail Detail",
        "component": "data-list",
        "stateExamples": [
          "loading",

        "sourceRouteFile": "agent-native/templates/mail/app/routes/$view.$threadId.tsx"
      },
      {

        "component": "data-list",
        "stateExamples": [
          "loading",

      "data-list",
      "panel",
      "text-field"

    "stateFixtures": {
      "longContent": "Agent-Native Mail keeps the original Agent-Native route inventory visible while Studio UI renders safe resident components for Harness inspection.",
      "empty": "No records are loaded for Agent-Native Mail in the local Studio UI port; the original Agent-Native data/runtime remains referenced by source path.",
      "error": "Agent-Native Mail agent or action state is display-only until Jami Harness owns the runtime execution path."
    },
    "agentNativeTemplate": {
      "sourceRepo": "https://github.com/yrka-io/agent-native.git",
      "upstreamRepo": "https://github.com/BuilderIO/agent-native.git",
      "sourcePath": "agent-native/templates/mail",
      "copiedSource": false,
      "license": "ISC",

      "sourceDirectories": [

        "server",

lifecycle.migrationNotes: Agent-Native Agent-Native Mail template imported from yrka-io/agent-native as a complete Studio UI workspace shell over all discovered route files; execution remains display-only behind Jami Harness contracts.

upstream.importedAs: jami-authored workspace shell and registry metadata derived from Agent-Native template structure

compatibility.shadcn: Studio UI registry metadata generated from Agent-Native template route inventory; source app remains upstream-owned until forked into Jami packages.
compatibility.tailwind: Consumes generated --jami-* CSS variables in the Studio UI workbench port.
